title: Tropical Confinement — Area Law from No-Inverse Lemma

analysis.object: T813: Tropical Confinement — Area Law from No-Inverse Lemma depth analysis

tropical_wilson_loop.description: Tropical Wilson loop: val(Tr P exp(i oint A)) -- MAX of val of matrix entries

area_law_tropical.description: Tropical area law: max over paths in tropical moduli grows linearly with area
area_law_tropical.reason: MAX selection = EML-1 exponential growth with area

no_inverse_lemma.description: T297: no tropical inverse -- no tropical morphism EML-inf -> EML-2

confinement_from_no_inverse.description: Tropical confinement: massless gluons would give EML-2 long-range force. T297 says no EML-inf -> EML-2. EML-inf gauge theory cannot have EML-2 long-range behavior.
confinement_from_no_inverse.reason: T297 directly forces confinement: no long-range EML-2 from EML-inf source

area_law_automatic.description: Tropical area law follows automatically from T297: if long-range were allowed, EML-inf -> EML-2 morphism would exist. Contradiction.

classical_confinement.description: Classical confinement inherits from tropical via descent -- same as Hodge

t813_theorem.description: T813: Tropical confinement follows from T297 (no-inverse lemma). EML-inf gauge theory cannot have EML-2 long-range component. Area law is automatic tropically. Classical confinement inherits via descent. T813.
t813_theorem.reason: Confinement = no-inverse lemma. Automatic in tropical.

analysis.theorem: T813: Tropical Confinement — Area Law from No-Inverse Lemma (S1092).

key_theorem: T813: Tropical Confinement — Area Law from No-Inverse Lemma (S1092).
